prestazioni: L28E inline-6 engine bored to 3.1L with forged internals (JE 9:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a T04Z Garrett turbocharger (60-1 compressor wheel, .82 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi of boost on a custom-tuned Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with individual cylinder fuel trims and 440cc Nismo injectors

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a 6-into-2-into-1 merge collector (hand-fabricated by Burns Stainless) and a custom 3.5-inch titanium muffler (by Fujitsubo GSpec) for optimized scavenging and weight reduction

Custom suspension setup featuring Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (S30-specific valving, 8-position adjustable rebound, and 22-way adjustable compression damping) paired with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars, Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension) for chassis rigidity
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (S30-specific, carbon fiber fenders, and custom rear diffuser) with a custom front splitter (hand-laid carbon fiber by Seibon) and a rear wing (Voltex Type-3, 3D carbon fiber, adjustable angle)

Custom interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (S30-specific mounting brackets) wrapped in Alcantara (Automobilli Lamborghini Grigio Estoque) with red stitching, a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (suede-wrapped), and a custom roll cage (by Custom Cages UK, 4-point bolt-in, TIG-welded chromoly)

Exterior paint: Nissan Heritage Period Correct Racing Green (code: 720) with a 3-stage mirror-polished finish (by Mirror Finish Detailing), paired with custom gold-painted 15x9 and 15x10 SSR MkIII Type C wheels (ET0 front, ET-12 rear) wrapped in 225/50R15 and 255/50R15 Toyo R888R tires
